title: Intelligent Workflow Automation
shortDescription: Transform manual processes into self-running AI systems operating 24/7.
longDescription: Stop the copy-paste, the chasing, the follow-up. We architect, build, and monitor workflows that handle the operational layer of your business so your team works on what compounds.
process: Process audit — we map every step of your current workflow
Architecture design — you approve before we build
Build & test — fully documented, in your stack
Go live + monitor — Arora watches for drift

title: Custom AI Chatbot Development
shortDescription: Bespoke AI assistant trained on your business — handles leads, support, bookings.
longDescription: Not a generic chatbot. A bespoke AI agent trained on your knowledge base, tone, and policies. Qualifies leads before a human touches them, books meetings without back-and-forth, handles 24/7 with measurable conversion lift.
benefits: Trained on your knowledge base, tone, and policies
Qualifies leads before a human touches them
process: Discovery — content sources, tone, escalation paths
Build — model selection, knowledge ingestion, persona
Deploy — embed on site, integrate with CRM, monitor
